nodes.name: Incoming Lead Form
nodes.description: Receives POST request containing {name, email, message}

nodes.name: Extract & Format Data
nodes.description: Maps incoming HTTP payload to internal variables

nodes.name: Validate Lead Data
nodes.description: Checks for missing fields and valid email format

nodes.name: Analyze Intent and Urgency
nodes.description: Calls LLM to analyze the message intent and urgency

nodes.name: Push to Google Sheets
nodes.description: Appends captured lead data to Google Sheets including validation and AI metadata
